title: How to Actually Burn Belly Fat FAST
description:
Stop wasting hours on cardio and crunches. If you want to lose belly fat, you need to focus on the only two things that scientifically work: A Calorie Deficit and Walking.

Most people think they need a gym membership to get shredded, but the truth is you just need to do the math. In this video, I break down why walking 10k steps is the ultimate fat loss cheat code and why your diet is the only thing that will reveal your abs.


#bellyfat  #fatloss #fitness
